The [[Loronar/Legends|Loronar]] '''B-7 light freighter''' was a starship used throughout the Galaxy.

==Characteristics==
It was 19 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, it carried 1 pilot, 1 gunner, 8 passengers, and 1 metric ton of cargo. It boasted one light laser cannon. Its cockpit was inset underneath an overhanging element of the mail hull, and sat above the large downward folding loading platform. It also had a radar dish.

==History==
The B-7 was manufactured decades before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Cradossk/Legends|Cradossk]] used a B-7 leased from the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild|Guild]] early in his career.<ref name="Killing">''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]''</ref>

During the last months of the Clone Wars, [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] purchased a B-7 freighter to take [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]] and [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy|Scout]], [[FIII Footman droid|Tac-Spec Footman]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Fidelis]] and himself from [[Jovan Station]] to [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] to meet [[Dooku/Legends|Count Dooku]].

In [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], the B-7 ''[[Starhaven]]'' belonged to the [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Aveca Dunn]].

One B-7, the ''[[Muvon]]'', was part of the ''[[FarStar]]''{{'s}} complement during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
